Off Calendar Dec-01-2010 Continued To Jan-04-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Nov-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Paul H. Nathan, Esq. appeared with petitioner Dairong He, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Tai K. Luong, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.
Richard Luong was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - 75,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $18,750.00.
Medical Expenses - $3,781.00.
Costs - $1,218.42.

The net balance of $51,250.58 shall be deposited into a blocked account with First Republic Bank, located on California Street, San Francisco, CA 94118. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
